--- insert_on_conflict_do_update_where.sql
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar, baz) VALUES (1, 2, 3) ON CONFLICT (foo) DO UPDATE SET bar = 10, baz = DEFAULT WHERE foo > 0
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 17,
      NameEnd: 20,
      Name:    "foo",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 22,
      NameEnd: 25,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 27,
      NameEnd: 30,
      Name:    "baz",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.ValuesInput{
    Values: 32,
    Rows:   []*ast.ValuesRow{
      &ast.ValuesRow{
        Lparen: 39,
        Rparen: 47,
        Exprs:  []*ast.DefaultExpr{
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 40,
              ValueEnd: 41,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "1",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 43,
              ValueEnd: 44,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "2",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 46,
              ValueEnd: 47,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "3",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  OnConflict: &ast.OnConflict{
    On:             49,
    ConflictTarget: &ast.ConflictTargetColumns{
      Lparen:  61,
      Rparen:  65,
      Columns: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 62,
          NameEnd: 65,
          Name:    "foo",
        },
      },
    },
    ConflictAction: &ast.ConflictActionDoUpdate{
      Do:          67,
      UpdateItems: []ast.UpdateItem{
        &ast.UpdateItemSetValue{
          Path: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 81,
              NameEnd: 84,
              Name:    "bar",
            },
          },
          DefaultExpr: &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 87,
              ValueEnd: 89,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "10",
            },
          },
        },
        &ast.UpdateItemSetValue{
          Path: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 91,
              NameEnd: 94,
              Name:    "baz",
            },
          },
          DefaultExpr: &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: 97,
            Default:    true,
          },
        },
      },
      Where: &ast.Where{
        Where: 105,
        Expr:  &ast.BinaryExpr{
          Op:   ">",
          Left: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 111,
            NameEnd: 114,
            Name:    "foo",
          },
          Right: &ast.IntLiteral{
            ValuePos: 117,
            ValueEnd: 118,
            Base:     10,
            Value:    "0",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar, baz) VALUES (1, 2, 3) ON CONFLICT (foo) DO UPDATE SET bar = 10, baz = DEFAULT WHERE foo > 0
